ListAlarmExecutions.state: Filter by alarm state. Values: OK: Recovered, ALERT: Alerting, CLOSED: Closed
ListAlarmExecutions.noticeStates: Filter by alarm notification state. Values: SENT: Sent, NOT_SENT: Not sent, FAIL: Send failed, BLOCK_BY_PENDING_COUNT: Not sent due to insufficient frequency, BLOCK_BY_REPEAT_INTERVAL: Not sent due to repeat alarm interval not reached, BLOCK_BY_FREQUENCY: Not sent due to too many sends, BLOCK_BY_NOTICE_DISABLED: Not sent due to notification disabled
ListAlarmExecutions.startDateTime: Query start time, UTC, default: 30 days ago
ListAlarmExecutions.endDateTime: Query end time, UTC, default: current time
ListAlarmExecutions.order: Sort order. asc: ascending, desc: descending, default: desc
ListAlarmExecutions.pageSize: Number of items per page, max: 100
